creator: admin@mjbrune.org
text:
On 3/27/11 12:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/monitorix,
>
> Please note that PR ports/155976 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/155976
>
I accept this PR patch and allow the maintainer-ship to be transferred.

-- 
Michael James Brune
206-552-8572
